prompt: Each run overwrites the previous file content. What is the bug?
choices: FileWriter cannot write newline characters on Windows
FileWriter(String) opens the file in overwrite mode by default; each run truncates the file; use FileWriter("log.txt", true) to append
try-with-resources closes the file before writing completes
write(String) must be replaced with write(char[]) to avoid truncation
explanation: FileWriter(path) truncates the file on open. To append without overwriting, use FileWriter("log.txt", true) — the second boolean argument enables append mode.
